label: Frames
summary: Frameset cosplay: sticky side pane and main pane, each scrolling on its own, divided by a ridge.
era: Netscape 2.0 framesets, nav frame left, content frame right, minus the broken back button.

classes.name: rs-frames__side
classes.role: sticky side pane (top strip below svga)

classes.name: rs-frames--right
classes.role: modifier: side pane on the right

a11y: Side pane should be a <nav>, main pane a <main>. Real URLs, working back button, the parts framesets got wrong.
